entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is grown

entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of a crop

entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of the pearl millet genome

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Modern tools used for breeding and genetic analysis

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing plants with specific desired traits

entities.name: EARLY DROUGHT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought stress during its early growth stages

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines produced by repeated self-fertilization used for phenotyping

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region from which the panel of inbred lines was sourced

entities.name: EARLY DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of limited water availability during early growth stages

entities.name: WELL-IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Conditions where plants receive sufficient water

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: Various factors that contribute to the overall yield of a crop

entities.description: A method to identify genetic variants associated with a trait

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method for discovering and genotyping SNPs

entities.name: GENETIC RELATEDNESS
entities.description: The degree of genetic similarity between individuals used for correction in GWAS

entities.name: GENOME WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method to associate SNPs with specific traits across the whole genome

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the plant

entities.name: STAY-GREEN TRAIT
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain green leaves during drought or senescence

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic units of heredity that co-locate with association loci

entities.description: Biological pathways involved in the production of sirohaem and wax
